triggering_evidence.event_feed_second_yellow_treatment: second-yellow events are classified with red-card events and excluded from ordinary-yellow events

measurement_alignment.benchmark_comparable_yellows: raw yellow cautions minus second-yellow red events
measurement_alignment.benchmark_comparable_reds: direct red plus second-yellow red events

authorization_policy: All engineering, event-compatibility and isolated-validation gates must be rerun after measurement alignment. No prior team-comparison probability is reused.
scientific_interpretation: Semantic measurement alignment between simulator and provider event taxonomy; not parameter fitting.
